systems.name: NBA Goose System
systems.summary: Quarter ATS chase built around road favorites laying -5.5 or more, with a first-quarter entry and a third-quarter double-down only if the opener loses.
systems.definition: Track every NBA game where the road team closes as a favorite of -5.5 or more. Bet the road favorite 1Q ATS. If that leg wins, stop. If it loses, double the original stake and bet the road favorite 3Q ATS.
qualifierRules: Road team must close as the favorite.
Full-game spread must be -5.5 or shorter for the road favorite (for example -6.0, -7.5, -10.0).
Sequence is only trackable once 1Q and 3Q ATS lines are available.
systems.thesis: The angle is that strong road favorites should win this two-step sequence above 60% over time, but the thesis cannot be validated honestly without quarter spread line capture and settled quarter results.

dataRequirements.label: Closing full-game spread
dataRequirements.detail: Needed to confirm the -5.5 road favorite qualifier.

dataRequirements.label: 1Q ATS line
dataRequirements.detail: Not wired yet. Required to know whether Bet 1 actually qualified and how it closed.

dataRequirements.label: 3Q ATS line
dataRequirements.detail: Not wired yet. Required for the double-down leg after a first-quarter loss.

dataRequirements.label: Quarter settlement outcomes
dataRequirements.detail: Can be inferred only if quarter score data and matching lines exist for the same game.

trackingNotes: First pass only: quarter spread ingestion is explicitly not automated yet.
Performance cards should be treated as placeholders until quarter lines are stored consistently.
Manual backfills can populate historical rows later without changing the page shape.
